Records.description: Two-loop non-planar three-point function with one massless and two off-shell external legs ($p_1^2=0, p_2^2 \neq 0, q^2 = s \neq 0$) and four massive internal propagators of equal mass $m$, relevant for non-planar corrections to $H$+jet production through a massive fermion loop. The family has two master integrals which satisfy a coupled second-order homogeneous differential equation in $d=4$ in the variables $x = -s/m^2, y = -p_2^2/m^2$ (Eqs. 4.5, 4.6). The maximal cut is computed by first cutting the inner one-loop box and then localizing the remaining two delta-functions, yielding a homogeneous solution $F_1 \sim (x-y)/\sqrt{x^2 - 2x(y+8) + y^2} \cdot \operatorname{EllipticK}((x-y)^2/(x^2-2(y+8)x+y^2))$ (Eq. 4.18). A second independent solution $F_2$ is obtained from $\operatorname{EllipticK}(1-w)$. The single off-shell limit $p_2^2 \to 0$ reproduces the homogeneous solution of the corresponding non-planar two-loop triangle with one off-shell leg.
Records.familyName: two-loop non-planar triangle with two off-shell legs and four massive propagators
